name: Mixed Workload
description: Combination of OLTP and OLAP workloads

queries.sql: SELECT k, c FROM sbtest1 WHERE id = {id}
SELECT * FROM sbtest1 WHERE id BETWEEN {low} AND {high} LIMIT 50
SELECT id, k FROM sbtest1 WHERE k = {k_val} LIMIT 10
UPDATE sbtest1 SET k = k + 1 WHERE id = {id}
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(k), SUM(k) FROM sbtest1 WHERE k > {threshold}
SELECT (k % 1000) as bucket, COUNT(*), AVG(k) FROM sbtest1 GROUP BY bucket
queries.description: OLAP: GROUP BY with moderate cardinality

queries.sql: SELECT id, k FROM sbtest1 WHERE k BETWEEN {low_k} AND {high_k} ORDER BY k DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT (k / 10000) as range, COUNT(*), MIN(k), MAX(k), AVG(k) FROM sbtest1 GROUP BY range HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
SELECT id, k FROM sbtest1 ORDER BY k DESC LIMIT 200
